english_text: Ayaats / Topics — A B C D C B A
alt_text: Chiastic-structure diagram applied to Quranic content: colored dots labelled A B C around a central dark-blue D, then mirrored C B A on the other side; green arrows on each end labelled 'Ayaats' (above) and 'Topics' (below).
notes: Maps the ring-composition pattern to ayaat (verses) and topical structure in a surah.
